title: OX Tools P224301 Pro Heavy Duty Fixed Blade Folding Knife, Blue/Black (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
OX Pro Heavy Duty Fixed Blade Folding Knife
description: From the manufacturer Rugged & Durable Constructed with a zinc alloy upper body and aluminium handle , this knife delivers heavy-duty strength while staying light and balanced in hand. Whether you're cutting drywall, slicing insulation, stripping wire, or opening boxes, this knife delivers consistent performance and job site ready reliability. Quick Fold The fast folding mechanism allows for smooth blade deployment and secure storage - perfect for fast-paced, repetitive cutting tasks on site. Tool Free Blade Change Enjoy tool-free blade change with an easy change blade button pointer that allows it to lock in four different positions, and a blade storage compartment in its handle allows you to store up to three replaceable blades (included with the knife). 3 Spare Blades Included The rear compartment acts as blade storage and enables fast blade swaps with a simple push-button release - No downtime, No hassle. Supplied with 3 spare blades , it’s ready to go straight out of the box. Notched Thumb Rest Its ergonomic handle comes with a notched thumb rest for an enhanced grip. A notched thumb rest boosts grip and control, letting you apply more pressure with confidence and comfort during tough cuts. In-Built Wire Cutter The underside of the blade holder includes built-in notches designed for wire stripping and strap cutting - adding even more versatility. Multifunctional Whether you're cutting drywall, slicing insulation, stripping wire, or opening boxes, this knife delivers consistent performance and job site ready reliability. Belt Hook Integrated lanyard eyelet for tethering and a sturdy belt hook for on-the-go access, perfect for busy job sites and mobile tasks.
